name: Shrinking Rae
description:
she wants you to help her trap a raccoon😭

fortnite..pls.. fortnite bring invincible stuff back in the item shop i need to get her and allen..💔 also she would look so cute on the back of my cyclops skin..💔

ANYWAYS i had made this one cuz i wanted to see how a little story would go if you were like to cry or something.. (like have a disagreement) cuz that stuff is always fun i guess😭 also pretend that the apartment we saw her move into has a front porch😕

okay so most of the bots I have of her are kinda oddly specific so I would appreciate some ideas because my scenarios mostly involve animals cuz my main oc is a demi-human😓 if you've seen my things you've probably noticed that pattern... i tweak my stuff a bit so its more flexible for you guys. I know I've asked for ideas in the other two but that's the reason why😭
creator: lma000
